CustomField.description: Semicolon-separated list of Opportunity Record Type names that should be rolled up into membership-specific fields (e.g., Total Membership Amount) rather than general donation rollup fields. Default value is "Membership." Opportunities with these Record Types populate the membership rollup fields on Contact and Account.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Opportunity Record Types to roll up separately as memberships (e.g., into Total Membership Amount). Default: "Membership."
CustomField.label: Membership Record Type Names
